item.title: about
item.description: I am building a technical portfolio focused on practical work across cybersecurity, cloud infrastructure, and Microsoft 365 administration.

item.title: 0. Command management
item.description: Command Management Summary This note is a quick reference for command history and command reuse in the shell.

item.title: 1. Navigation
item.description: Navigation Summary This note is a quick reference for basic shell navigation.

item.title: 4. Search
item.description: Search Summary This note is a quick reference for finding text and files in the shell.

item.title: 5. Viewing content
item.description: Viewing Content Summary This note is a quick reference for reading files, logs, and command output in the terminal.

item.title: 6. Process management
item.description: Process Management Summary This note is a quick reference for checking and controlling running processes.

item.title: 7. Networking
item.description: Networking Summary This note is a quick reference for basic network inspection commands.

item.title: 9. Container Commands
item.description: Container Commands Summary This note is a quick reference for the container-related command layer used around Fedora Atomic.

item.title: index
item.description: Fedora SWAY Atomic Commands Summary This section is a quick reference for commands used around Fedora Atomic, terminal work, containers, and system inspection.

item.title: Fedora SWAY Atomic
item.description: Fedora SWAY Atomic Summary Fedora SWAY Atomic is an immutable Fedora-based system built around a read-only style base OS, Wayland-only Sway desktop workflow, and a strong separation between system layers.
